title: DeletionJob
description: An authorized deletion. A deletion is NOT complete until residual-artifact tests pass and a minimal verification record is written. See docs/runbooks/deletion-verification.md.

scope.description: What is being deleted: originals, previews, OCR, chunks, embeddings, indexes, relations, caches, histories.

verification.description: Signed result of residual-artifact search tests and backup-policy confirmation.
